Class SfsMonsterSpecies

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.SfsModel
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.data.SfsMonsterSpecies
public class SfsMonsterSpecies extends SfsModel
